##NAMES=Simonkolleite
##RRUFFID=R130616
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Zn_5_(OH)_8_Cl_2_·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Rowley mine, Maricopa County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Danielle Sotomayor and Keith Wentz
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless hexagonal tabular crystals, associated with blue platy crystals with chemistry CuZnCl(OH)<sub>3</sub> (R140401). Crystals are on a metallic mining artifact of copper composition.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130616
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.34 b: 6.34 c: 23.654 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 823.4 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
